index.html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>Neon Racer - Ultimate Car Racing Game</title>
    <style>
        * {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }

        body {
            font-family: 'Arial', sans-serif;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0c0c0c 0%, #1a1a2e 50%, #16213e 100%);
            color: #00ffff;
            overflow: hidden;
            height: 100vh;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            position: relative;
        }

        canvas {
            border: 2px solid #00ffff;
            border-radius: 15px;
            box-shadow: 0 0 30px #00ffff, inset 0 0 30px rgba(0, 255, 255, 0.1);
            background: #000;
        }

        .ui {
            position: absolute;
            top: 20px;
            left: 20px;
            right: 20px;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: center;
            z-index: 100;
        }

        .score-panel {
            background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.8);
            padding: 15px 25px;
            border-radius: 10px;
            border: 1px solid #00ffff;
            box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(0, 255, 255, 0.3);
            backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
        }

        .score {
            font-size: 24px;
            font-weight: bold;
            text-shadow: 0 0 10px #00ffff;
        }

        .level {
            font-size: 18px;
            color: #ff00ff;
            text-shadow: 0 0 10px #ff00ff;
        }

        .controls {
            position: absolute;
            bottom: 20px;
            left: 50%;
            transform: translateX(-50%);
            display: flex;
            gap: 10px;
            z-index: 100;
        }

        .btn {
            padding: 15px 25px;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 10px;
            background: linear-gradient(45deg, #00ffff, #0080ff);
            color: #000;
            font-weight: bold;
            font-size: 16px;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all 0.3s ease;
            box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(0, 255, 255, 0.5);
            touch-action: manipulation;
        }

        .btn:hover, .btn:active {
            transform: scale(1.05);
            box-shadow: 0 0 30px rgba(0, 255, 255, 0.8);
        }

        .btn-nitro {
            background: linear-gradient(45deg, #ff00ff, #ff4081);
            box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(255, 0, 255, 0.5);
        }

        .btn-pause {
            background: linear-gradient(45deg, #ffff00, #ffaa00);
            box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(255, 255, 0, 0.5);
        }

        .game-over {
            position: absolute;
            top: 50%;
            left: 50%;
            transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
            background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.95);
            padding: 40px;
            border-radius: 20px;
            border: 2px solid #ff0000;
            text-align: center;
            box-shadow: 0 0 50px rgba(255, 0, 0, 0.5);
            display: none;
            z-index: 200;
        }

        .game-over h1 {
            color: #ff0000;
            font-size: 36px;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            text-shadow: 0 0 20px #ff0000;
        }

        .high-score {
            color: #ffff00;
            font-size: 20px;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            text-shadow: 0 0 10px #ffff00;
        }

        @media (max-width: 768px) {
            canvas {
                width: 95vw;
                height: 70vh;
            }
            
            .ui {
                flex-direction: column;
                gap: 10px;
                top: 10px;
            }
            
            .controls {
                flex-wrap: wrap;
                bottom: 10px;
            }
            
            .btn {
                padding: 12px 20px;
                font-size: 14px;
            }
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <canvas id="gameCanvas"></canvas>
    
    <div class="ui">
        <div class="score-panel">
            <div class="score">Score: <span id="score">0</span></div>
            <div class="level">Level: <span id="level">1</span> | Speed: <span id="speed">1x</span></div>
        </div>
        <div class="score-panel">
            <div>High Score: <span id="highScore">0</span></div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="controls" id="mobileControls" style="display: none;">
        <button class="btn" id="leftBtn">←</button>
        <button class="btn" id="nitroBtn">NITRO</button>
        <button class="btn" id="pauseBtn">⏸️</button>
        <button class="btn" id="rightBtn">→</button>
    </div>

    <div class="game-over" id="gameOver">
        <h1>💥 CRASH! 💥</h1>
        <div class="high-score" id="finalHighScore">High Score: 0</div>
        <button class="btn" onclick="restartGame()">RESTART</button>
        <button class="btn" onclick="startGame()">NEW GAME</button>
    </div>

    <audio id="engineSound" preload="auto" loop>
        <source src="data:audio/wav;base64,
